summary: Focana now gives you a cleaner handoff at the end of a session, whether you want a break, another focused block, or a fresh start.
fixes: Timed sessions now hand off directly into Session Wrap instead of getting stranded at 00:00 or falling into a separate timeout modal.
Post-session notes and follow-up screens now size more reliably so actions and text fields stay visible.
Break-time floating interactions now behave more predictably whether the countdown is hidden or shown.
improvements: Session Wrap now offers clearer next steps: Take a break, Keep working, Start a new task, or Done for now.
Keep working now supports a faster timed restart flow, including Enter-to-start from the post-session timer field.
Break mode now lets you choose whether minimizing shows the countdown timer, with quicker click behavior for returning to work.
Idle nudges now ask “What’s next?” and keep Session History and Parking Lot easy to reach from the re-entry prompt.
